title: Add known-commands listing to LLM prompt with deny-list filtering
description:
The LLM doesn't consistently use the right command format for /tp and /summon. From chat: "[DEBUG] This needs to be part of the common commands listing (which should be stripped of any that are on the disabled list)"

The system prompt should include a curated list of available Minecraft commands with their correct syntax (e.g., `/tp <target> <destination>`, `/summon <entity> <x> <y> <z>`). Commands that are on the DeniedCommands list should be excluded from this prompt list.
